***![][image1]The “Option” Template***

**Purchase Price**

* Purchase Price Shall be $\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_.  
  * *Purchase price can either be an all-cash amount or an attachment explaining the terms.*  
  * *It is also appropriate to attach an undated purchase and sale agreement to the recorded option.* 

**Consideration**

* Option Consideration Shall be \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_.  
  * *(Note that consideration doesn’t necessarily have to just be a cash payment.)*

**Option Window**

* Window to exercise option shall open on \_\_\_ /\_\_\_ /\_\_\_\_ and close on \_\_\_ /\_\_\_ /\_\_\_\_.

**The Option Agreement…**  
\- is signed by all parties.  
\- has a legal description of the property attached.  
\- is recorded in the county.   
\- becomes an encumbrance on the property.  
\- Is a legal binding right to purchase the property.

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
